query:
SELECT u.name, l.digestType, l.weekKey, l.status, l.itemCount, l.sentAt, l.error
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Ryan%' AND l.digestType = 'thursday' AND l.weekKey = '2026W20'
ORDER BY l.sentAt DESC;
